{{Quote|Toy Dampner has joined the pack in his black-and-white Turca Special. Hoo, he looks fast!|[[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fodesinbeed Annodue]], a Podrace commentator|audio=Fode-ToyDampner2.flac|<ref name="E1R">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']]</ref>}}
The '''910 Special''' was a [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] model manufactured by [[Turca]]. Also known as the '''Turca Special''', the Podracer had well balanced capabilities, including a good top speed, a modest accelerator, and well tuned repair unit. The Podracer also had decent handling, but suffered in terms of [[Coolant pump/Legends|cooling]], which caused the Podracer to quickly overheat during extended bursts of speed. The Podracer's best native feature were its air brakes.

A heavily modified 910 Special was owned by the [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Toy Dampner]]. In order to combat the vehicle's poor heat prevention systems, Dampner installed the best coolant pump he could find, allowing the 910 to cool down faster after using the vessel's booster. Dampner used his [[Color/Legends|black]] and white Turca Special to great effect on the [[Executioner (course)/Legends|race courses]] of the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]], which sped through a [[Desolation Alley|penal colony]].

==Description==
[[File:Turca_GBC.png|thumb|left|200px|Toy Dampner's Turca Special in a hangar]]
Designed by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC1" /> the 910 Special [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]],<ref name="Nint" /> which was also known as the Turca Special,<ref name="E1R" /> was built by the company [[Turca]]. The Podracer consisted of two large [[Engine/Legends|engines]] that were connected via [[Energy binder/Legends|energy binders]]. The engines were controlled by a solitary [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]] that was connected by two [[Color/Legends|black]] cables. The engine turbines were cased in a kind of metal, and the general shape of the engines were large cylinders. Each cylindrical engine was protected by a square shield placed on the top of each engine. The shields had two large rectangular shapes jutting off of the back of the engines, which protected the left and right sides of the engine exhaust ports. The cockpit roughly bore the shape of an isosceles triangle, and seated one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] with no room for passengers.<ref name="Nint" />

In terms of capabilities, the 910 Special had modest stats and parts. The Podracer's native [[Coolant pump/Legends|cooling systems]] were poor, however. One Turca Special was acquired by the [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]] pilot [[Toy Dampner]], who customized it to a great degree. Disappointed with the native cooling system, Dampner sought out the best coolant pump he could find and installed it on his 910. This addition allowed the Podracer to cool down quickly after thrusting. Dampner's additions turned his vessel into a very balanced racing craft. Its most outstanding qualities, however, were its [[Air brake/Legends|air brakes]] and its [[repulsorgrip]]. The former allowed the vessel to slow down at a faster pace than other Podracers, which allowed Dampner to take tight turns with ease. The repulsorgrip allowed Dampner a greater amount of control over various kinda of terrains,<ref name="Nint" /> although Dampner had specially modified his Podracer for use on the [[Podracing/Legends|race courses]] located on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]],<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> which consisted mainly of cement and metal roadways, with occasional offerings of rock fields.<ref name="E1R" />

The Special's [[Fuel injector/Legends|fuel injector]] offered the vehicle a decent amount of acceleration, although with a low top speed granted by the installed [[Thrust Coil]], it did not take long for the Podracer to reach its top speed.<ref name="Nint" /> However, at some point the Turca Special's speed had improved, and was clocked at 985 [[Kilometer per hour/Legends|kpm]].<ref name="E1RSpeed" /> The 910 Special also had a strong repair unit, which allowed Dampner to make mid-flight repairs with ease, allowing him to stay active in damaging courses. Overall, Dampner's Podracer was rated as the third best Podracer in terms of acceleration and repair when compared to the other Podracers seen during the 32 BBY racing season. His Turca Special was also rated as the second best Podracer in terms of air brakes, only falling behind [[Devlikk/Legends|Devlikk]] pilot [[Wan Sandage/Legends|Wan Sandage's]] [[Elsinore-Cordova Engineering]] [[TurboDyne 99-U/Legends|''TurboDyne'' 99-U]] Podracer.<ref name="Nint" />

==History==
[[File:Toy_Dampner.png|thumb|right|150px|Toy Dampner owned a Turca Special.]]
Developed by or during the year 32 BBY<ref name="NEC1" /> by the manufacturer Turca, a 910 Special Podracer found its way into the hands of the [[Unidentified blue-skinned short-legged species|blue-skinned]] Toy Dampner, a Podracer pilot who preferred the courses located on the fourth moon of the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Oovo]]. The courses were fairly urban, as they sped through the [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Desolation Alley]]. Dissatisfied with the 910 Special's native features, Dampner put the vehicle through a number of modifications, including the addition of the best coolant pump that he could locate. The Podracer was painted white and given black stripes,<ref name="Nint" /> and matched the color scheme of the flag Dampner chose to represent himself with in the sport.<ref name="E1R" />

Dampner and his Podracer achieved fame on Oovo IV, and Dampner was considered to be the crowd favorite of the course named [[Executioner (course)/Legends|Executioner]], which got its name from the [[Ore/Legends|ore]] filled anti-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] tunnels that littered the track, which was the first course of the [[Semipro Podracing Circuit]]. Dampner achieved a record lap time of ''01:31.540'' [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]], and a record race time of ''04:42.310'' minutes.<ref name="Nint" /> A bit of a show off, Dampner enjoyed showing off the capabilities of his Turca Special to his friends in Desolation Alley.<ref name="Prima" />

Dampner also used the vessel on a [[Baroonda drag course 2|race course]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Baroonda/Legends|Baroonda]].<ref name="E1R2">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] [[Wikipedia:Game Boy Color|Game Boy Color]] version</ref> The [[Troig/Legends|Troig]] race commentator [[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fode Annodue]] thought that Dampner's rig appeared to be fast.<ref name="E1R" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Turca_Animatic.png|thumb|left|200px|The 910 Special as seen during an animatic]]
Although the 910 Special Podracer first appeared in the [[1999]]<ref name="IGN">{{WebCite|url=http://www.ign.com/games/star-wars-episode-i-racer/n64-10490|text=Star Wars: Episode I: Racer - Nintendo 64 - IGN|work=[http://www.ign.com IGN]|archivedate=20170909020128}}</ref> [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]'',<ref name="E1R" /> it was originally designed for use in the 1999 film the game was based on, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. The Podracer made it as far as the film's animatic stages, but was cut from the final release, and had its scenes exchanged for scenes involving pilot [[Clegg Holdfast/Legends|Clegg Holdfast]] and his [[Keizar-Volvec/Legends|Keizar-Volvec]] [[9T9-B Wasp/Legends|KV9T9-B ''Wasp'']] Podracer. The animatics are view-able on the [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD]] special features of ''The Phantom Menace''.<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}} [[Star Wars home video releases|DVD special features]]</ref>

Background information about the Podracer was revealed in ''Episode I Racer''{{'s}} two [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer Official Nintendo Player's Guide|strategy]] [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|guides]] that were released as an accompaniment to the game.<ref name="Nint" /><ref name="Prima" /> The Turca Podracer later received a brief mention in [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' under an entry for Toy Dampner.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I||Dampner, Toy}}</ref>
